===={{B2W2}}====
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Giovanni uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. Giovanni will always lead with his signature Pokémon, {{p|Rhyperior}}.

====[[Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon]]====
Giovanni's Pokémon are kept in [[Master Ball]]s. His {{p|Mewtwo}}'s moveset and [[Mega Stone]] differ between the two versions. He will always send out Mewtwo last and [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]] it at the first opportunity.

=====Pokémon Ultra Sun=====
{{Party
| background = 666
| border = CC0000
